generated_oml:
instance SystemFaultAlert : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "continuous validation alerts for system faults"
]

instance OptimalTrajectoryPlanning : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "optimal trajectory planning for crane movement"
]

instance RealTimeStatusVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "real-time status visualization for operator decisions"
]

instance OptimalTrajectoryGeneration : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "optimal trajectory generation using kinematic model"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalTrajectoryPlanning
]

instance HistoricalDataLogging : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "historical data logging to TimescaleDB"
]

instance GrafanaVisualization : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Grafana-based visualization"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeStatusVisualization
]

instance CraneSimulation : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "crane simulation"
]

instance ContinuousValidation : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "continuous validation comparing real measurements against simulations"
    DTDFVocab:provides SystemFaultAlert
]

instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "measuring hoist swing motion"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance Anemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "measuring wind speed"
    DTDFVocab:producedData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance CartStepperMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "controlled by TMC4671-Eval motor controllers for cart movement"
]

instance HoistStepperMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "controlled by TMC4671-Eval motor controllers for hoist movement"
]

instance Electromagnet : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "for container handling"
]

instance TMC4671EvalMotorController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "motor controller for cart and hoist stepper motors"
]

instance Arduino : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Arduino microcontroller for interfacing sensors and actuators"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLogging
]

instance SwingAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]

instance WindSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Anemometer
]

instance Docker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "for containerization"
    DTDFVocab:enables CraneSimulation
]

instance TimescaleDB : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "for time-series data storage"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLogging
]

instance Grafana : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "for visualization"
    DTDFVocab:enables GrafanaVisualization
]

instance EclipseMosquittoMQTTBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "facilitating inter-service communication"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLogging, GrafanaVisualization, ContinuousValidation
]

instance PythonGantrylibModule : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python gantrylib module for crane control and simulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalTrajectoryGeneration, CraneSimulation, ContinuousValidation
]

instance AutodeskFusion360 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "for CAD modeling"
]

instance CapellaMBSE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "for Model-Based Systems Engineering"
]

instance HistoricalTimeSeriesData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "historical time-series data stored in TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleDataTransmitted, WindSpeedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB, Grafana
]

instance RealTimeMeasurements : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "real-time sensor measurements for swing angle and wind speed"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleDataTransmitted, WindSpeedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonGantrylibModule
]

instance CADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "CAD models created in Autodesk Fusion360"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonGantrylibModule
]

instance KinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "kinematic model for trajectory optimization"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonGantrylibModule
]

instance LabScaleGantryCraneSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Lab-scale gantry crane system inspired by harbor cranes in Antwerp, moving pucks representing containers between locations"
    base:contains CartStepperMotor, HoistStepperMotor, Electromagnet, TMC4671EvalMotorController, SwingAngleEncoder, Anemometer
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Optimal trajectory commands generated by Trajectory Generator Service sent to cart and hoist motors through the Physical Crane Interface Python program."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Continuous real-time synchronization for data logging and validation checks."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Physical crane connected to Python-based interfaces, with digital services (database, dashboard, simulation) deployed on a single PC using Docker containers and MQTT for communication."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "As-operated phase, supporting continuous validation and monitoring during crane operation."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Continuous validation service compares real-time measurements against simulated trajectories, calculating distance metrics against predefined thresholds for system integrity."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for internal service communication; physical hardware interface details unspecified."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Deployed on a single personal computer using Docker Compose for containerized services (TimescaleDB, Grafana, Mosquitto)."
]
